2005February 27, 2005

🇳🇴 Lillehammer, Norway

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Lillehammer, Norway, February 27, 2005 -- March 4, 2005

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2005-03-lillehammer-norway

11 Resolutions

641Plenary
Request wording in standards regarding translated versions
SC 4 requests the NSBs to review their policies for translating standards which might be a basis for software applications, in order to avoid creating incompatibilities between implementations. The...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
640Plenary
Seek nominations for Product Data Quality Strategy Task Force
SC 4 has identified the need to create a Task Force to develop a Strategy for the PDQ Requirements of SC 4 concerns. The title of the Task Force will be: Product Data Quality (PDQ) Strategy for Ind...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
639Plenary
Create ad hoc group for SC 4 Maintenance Agency procedures
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group with the task of developing a unified approach to specify the procedures for a Maintenance Agency administered by the SC 4 secretariat to support reference data databas...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
638Plenary
Request PPC justify free web availability of selected SC 4 standards
SC 4 believes that the free of charge availability of selected SC 4 standards will further promote the adoption of those standards and increase their visibility in a highly competitive marketplace ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
637Plenary
Request WG 11 review of OWL technology deployment
SC 4 requests WG 11 to conduct a review of the deployment of OWL technology in SC 4, with contributions from the other WGs, and make recommendations for its consistent use.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
636Plenary
Approve PWI for Process Monitoring Data
SC 4 approves the PWI set out in SC 4 N1865, with a view to creating a common resource for SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
635Plenary
Appoint Gerald Radack as liaison to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 32
SC 4 appoints Gerald Radack as the liaison officer from SC 4 to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 32, and related activities and invites ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 32 to notify SC 4 of its reciprocal liaison officer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
634Plenary
Request liaison with ISO/TC 37/SC 1 and appoint officers
SC 4 requests an active two-way liaison with ISO/TC 37/SC 1 and requests the SC 4 Secretary to confirm this liaison with the ISO Central Secretariat. SC 4 appoints Gerald Radack and Eric Sardet as ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
633Plenary
Reappoint David Loffredo as WG 11 Convenor
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of David Loffredo to serve as Convenor of WG 11.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons. We appreciate your representation to and for ISO/TC 184/SC 4. A special thank you to the SC 4 Liaison Plenary presenters for their insightful and comprehensive pr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its particular thanks to Mr. Knut Lindelien and his staff, Rune Bergwitz, Berit Holthe, Audun Lona and Bjørnhild Sæterøy for their superior administrative support, outstanding hospit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
